title: MFFU vs Earn2Trade (2026): Skip the Eval vs Stay on LiveSim Forever
description: MFFU sells a Pro plan that skips the eval entirely — pay one-time, get an instant-funded simulated account. Earn2Trade defers the live-capital step indefinitely — 94.77% of 2025 passers stayed on LiveSim. Both paths land the trader on simulated capital forever, by completely opposite mechanics. Different lock families, opposite consistency scopes, opposite trail families. Honest 2026 side-by-side.

og.title: MFFU vs Earn2Trade (2026): Skip the Eval vs Stay on LiveSim Forever
